title: sqlx-migrate: full schema from spec, idempotent migrations
description:
Implement all database migrations using sqlx::migrate!(). Create migrations/0001_initial.sql with the complete schema from the spec. Each subsequent feature adds a new migration file. Schema must exactly match the spec: all tables, all indexes, all CHECK constraints, all FK references. The CHECK constraints on mentions (XOR post_id/remote_post_id) and similar must be implemented.

Agent workflow: Spawn a subagent to transcribe the full schema from the spec, another to review FK consistency (every FK reference points to a table+column that exists).

Test discipline:
- Run migrations against a fresh in-memory database, verify all tables exist (query sqlite_master)
- Run migrations twice (idempotency): must not error on second run (sqlx handles this via migrations table)
- Verify FK constraints work: try inserting an account with invalid avatar_media_id, expect FK error
- Verify all indexes exist: query sqlite_master WHERE type='index'

Defensive programming:
- Never modify a migration file that has been committed — always add a new migration
- Test migrations run in CI against a fresh file (not in-memory) to catch file permission issues
acceptance_criteria: All tables and indexes from spec exist after migration; FK constraints are enforced (foreign_keys=ON); running migrations twice is safe; migration version tracked in _sqlx_migrations table
